name: ariadne
description: Local-first multilingual memory for Codex, Claude Code, and MCP clients.
long_description: Ariadne provides durable local memory through hybrid dense and sparse retrieval. It uses a local Qdrant server and Ollama bge-m3 embeddings, supports 100+ languages, avoids embedded database locking under concurrent sessions, and reports local content-free estimates of context reused by recall. Install the native runtime first so Qdrant and Ollama are available, then connect this MCP server.

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Recall relevant multilingual memories with hybrid dense and keyword search.

tools.name: memory_save
tools.description: Save a durable fact, decision, or piece of project context.

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Delete one confirmed memory by its exact id.

tools.name: memory_move
tools.description: Move or retag one memory without re-embedding its text.
